creator: jes@houston.rr.com
text:
The following patch against -stable fixes the problems mentioned in this PR. 
I've been running it for over 2 months now without any problems on my -stable 
machines. It should also apply cleanly against -current. After application a 
rebuild of the kernel and SysV IPC utilties is required.

Old SysV IPC binaries will still exhibit the problems mentioned in this PR 
possibly possing a secuirity risk.

http://www.smethers.net/~jason/FreeBSD/patches/kern.ipc.3.u.diff

- Jason
